description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline, half sleeves, and graphic and flock print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Greet in style with the Hawaiian shaka sign with your hand and enjoy those happy, summery days in style in this green cotton t-shirt from lee. Pay tribute to Henry David lee, founder of the brand, and the cities of the USA that helped the brand grow and prosper with this tee. Team it with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
